code:
sequenceDiagram
  accTitle: Sequence diagram title is here
  accDescr: Hello friends

participant Alice
participant Bob
participant John as JohnSecond Line
rect rgb(200, 220, 100)
rect rgb(200, 255, 200)
Alice ->> Bob: Hello Bob, how are you?
Bob-->>John: How about you John?
end
Bob--x Alice: I am good thanks!
Bob-x John: I am good thanks!
Note right of John: John thinks a longlong time, so longthat the text doesnot fit on a row.
Bob-->Alice: Checking with John...
Note over John:wrap: John looks like he's still thinking, so Bob prods him a bit.
Bob-x John: Hey John - we're still waiting to knowhow you're doing
Note over John:nowrap: John's trying hard not to break his train of thought.
Bob-x John:wrap: John! Are you still debating about how you're doing? How long does it take??
Note over John: After a few more moments, Johnfinally snaps out of it.
end
alt either this
Alice->>John: Yes
else or this
Alice->>John: No
else or this will happen
Alice->John: Maybe
end
par this happens in parallel
Alice -->> Bob: Parallel message 1
and
Alice -->> John: Parallel message 2
end

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个时序图，描述Alice、Bob和John三个人之间的对话场景。John这个角色的显示名要特殊一点，叫"JohnSecond Line"，因为他名字比较长。整个对话发生在一个浅绿色的背景框里。
明白。我注意到您提到了浅绿色背景，但还需要再确认一下——这个绿色框外面是不是还有一层颜色？我看到描述里似乎有个嵌套结构，外层可能是另一种色调？
对，外层用rgb(200, 220, 100)这种偏黄的绿色，内层才是那个亮一点的rgb(200, 255, 200)。对话从Alice向Bob问好开始，然后Bob去问John。
elements_involved: Alice - Bob: Hello Bob, how are you?

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 好的，我已经把双层矩形框和开场对话加进去了。接下来Bob给Alice和John都回复了"I am good thanks!"，但给John的是虚线带叉的异步消息，对吧？
elements_involved: Bob--x Alice: I am good thanks!
Bob-x John: I am good thanks!

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 没错。然后这里有个重点：John要思考很久，久到一句话写不下。所以要在John右边加个note，内容就是"John thinks a longlong time, so longthat the text doesnot fit on a row."——故意不换行的。
elements_involved: John thinks a longlong time, so longthat the text doesnot fit on a row.

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 收到。那后面Bob又发了两条消息催John，中间还有几个note——我看到有的note标注了wrap，有的标注了nowrap，这个区别很重要吗？

很重要。第一个note用wrap，因为"John looks like he's still thinking..."这句话可以正常换行；第二个note用nowrap，要强制不换行，显示"John's trying hard not to break his train of thought."；最后一个note不用标注，默认换行，写"After a few more moments, Johnfinally snaps out of it."
elements_involved: Note over John:wrap: John looks like he's still thinking, so Bob prods him a bit.
Note over John:nowrap: John's trying hard not to break his train of thought.
Note over John: After a few more moments, Johnfinally snaps out of it.

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 都设置好了。那绿色框结束之后，外面还有个alt分支结构，三个分支分别是Yes/No/Maybe，最后还有个par并行区域让Alice同时给Bob和John发消息？

完全正确。alt的三个分支条件依次是"either this"、"or this"、"or this will happen"，Alice都给John发消息。par并行里Alice同时给Bob发"Parallel message 1"、给John发"Parallel message 2"。图题写"Sequence diagram title is here"，描述写"Hello friends"。
elements_involved: accTitle: Sequence diagram title is here
